'''Grejic''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who was the Executive Secretary of the [[Grand Hutt Council/Legends|Hutt Grand Council]] a few years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Grejic apparently succeeded [[Mardoc]]. He decreed that the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] should suffer for raising the price of [[Spice/Legends|spice]] after the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]]. The punishment entailed paying one million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to the clans which had lost resources in the battle.
